name: superagent-cla
description: GitHub App for Contributor License Agreement checks.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @superagent-cla/shared build && pnpm --filter @superagent-cla/api build && pnpm --filter @superagent-cla/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @superagent-cla/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @superagent-cla/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @superagent-cla/web typecheck
